tool_args.hypothesis: DecideBet can be called by anyone to decide pending bets, allowing arbitrary resolution/favoring an attacker if it lacks a check that only the house may call.

steps.tool_result: {"ok": true, "target_function": "DecideBet", "hypothesis": "DecideBet can be called by anyone to decide pending bets, allowing arbitrary resolution/favoring an attacker if it lacks a check that only the house may call."}

tool_args.exploit_logic: Call DecideBet from an address that is NOT the bet.house and assert the call reverts with 'Must be called by house'. Use bet_id 0 (uninitialized) so bets[0].house == address(0) and any non-zero caller will fail the require.

steps.tool_result: {"ok": true, "verdict": "fail_error_runtime", "error_summary": "[FAIL: panic: memory allocation error (0x41)] test_attacker_exploits_DecideBet() (gas: 51681) | \u2502   \u2514\u2500 \u2190 [Revert] Must be called by house | \u2514\u2500 \u2190 [Revert] panic: memory allocation error (0x41)", "calls_used": 1, "calls_remaining": 3}

tool_args.reason: PlaceBet is external and may lack checks allowing anyone to place bets that incorrectly reserve or transfer funds or bypass house pause/min/max checks.

tool_args.hypothesis: PlaceBet might allow placing a bet on a paused house or manipulate house balances by passing crafted bet_placed_timestamp or wrong house address; possibly missing checks on msg.sender vs player mapping allowing attacker to act as house.

steps.tool_result: {"ok": true, "target_function": "PlaceBet", "hypothesis": "PlaceBet might allow placing a bet on a paused house or manipulate house balances by passing crafted bet_placed_timestamp or wrong house address; possibly missing checks on msg.sender vs player mappin"}

tool_args.exploit_logic: Create a player, open a house with low min_bet and high max_loss, then call PlaceBet from attacker as player without providing required player creation should revert; alternatively call PlaceBet with house that is paused (pause_block==0) by crafting house mapping so require(houses[house].pause_block > block.number) bypasses? The PoC will create player and house and then call PlaceBet with amount exceeding player's balance to check insufficient funds message and successful reversion indicates potential to craft exploit.
